legend.OBSERVED: Directly computed from graph topology or explicit recurrence counts.
legend.DERIVED: Computed from transforms, projections, or ordered-structure proxies.
legend.SPECULATIVE: Operator-facing hypothesis layer only. Not used for any current score.

radiality.label: OBSERVED

linearity.method: path-likeness proxy from endpoint structure and acyclicity
